goals: Store personal preferences about football team allegiance and architectural interests
Search for stored memories about football preferences to verify recall
List all stored memories to review what has been remembered
Delete an outdated or incorrect memory about architectural preference

memories.text: Interested in Iraqi and Islamic architecture

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about football with a deep appreciation for architectural heritage. Tends to be expressive about interests but may be forgetful about details over time.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands their own preferences and interests but does not know how the memory system works internally or what tools are available. Relies on natural conversation to interact with the system.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored personal preferences, verified they can be retrieved, reviewed all stored memories, and removed an unwanted memory. The task completes when the user confirms the memory deletion was successful or expresses satisfaction with the memory management.
